subcodes.first_line: O thou who art intoxicated with the chalice of the Covenant! The epistle which thou didst write in the name of His Eminence Ḥájí Siyyid Javád [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سرمست جام پیمانه پیمان نامه که بنام جناب حاجی سید جواد مرقوم نموده بودید
subcodes.subjects: @business; financial; property matters, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
